debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_1
X : Type u_2
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
A : Ω → Set X
𝓕 : Finset (Set X)
x : X
d : ℕ
isNIPWith_𝓕 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓕
hA : ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂μ, A ω ∈ 𝓕
⊢ condVar (MeasurableSpace.generateFrom sorry) (fun ω => (A ω).indicator 1 x) μ ≤ sorry

failed_attempts:
refine (condVar_le_var _).trans (variance_le_of_bounded (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ ?_) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ ?_))
  · exact Set.indicator_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ zero_le_one) _
  · exact Set.indicator_le_one (fun _ _ ↦ le_rfl) _

refine condVar_le_of_bounded (ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_) (ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_)
  · simp only [Set.indicator_apply, Pi.one_apply]; split <;> norm_num
  · simp only [Set.indicator_apply, Pi.one_apply]; split <;> norm_num

rw [condVar_eq_condExp_sq_sub_sq_condExp]
  have h_ind : ∀ ω, (A ω).indicator 1 x = ((A ω).indicator 1 x) ^ 2 := fun ω ↦ by
    simp [Set.indicator_apply]; split <;> norm_num
  have h_bdd : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, 0 ≤ (A ω).indicator 1 x ∧ (A ω).indicator 1 x ≤ 1 := by
    filter_upwards; simp [Set.indicator_apply]; split <;> norm_num
  filter_upwards [condExp_congr_ae (eventually_of_forall h_ind), condExp_nonneg h_bdd.1,
    condExp_le_one h_bdd.2] with ω h_sq h_nonneg h_le
  rw [← h_sq]
  generalize condExp (fun ω ↦ (A ω).indicator 1 x) _ μ ω = p
  have : p - p ^ 2 = 1 / 4 - (p - 1 / 2) ^ 2 := by ring
  rw [this]
  simp only [sub_le_self_iff, sq_nonneg]
condVar_le_inv_four _ (fun ω ↦ by simp [Set.indicator_apply]; split <;> norm_num)

(SimpleFunc.ofFinite A hA).aemeasurable.indicator (measurable_const.indicator (measurable_set_singleton _))
  have : ∀ x : ℝ, x ∈ Set.Icc 0 1 → x - x ^ 2 ≤ 1 / 4 := fun x ⟨h₀, h₁⟩ ↦ by nlinarith
  filter_upwards [condExp_nonneg hX (by simp), condExp_le_one hX (by simp)] with ω h₀ h₁
  rw [condVar, Pi.sub_apply, Pi.pow_apply, ← condExp_sq_apply hX, indicator_sq]
  exact this _ ⟨h₀, h₁⟩

rcases eq_or_ne d 0 with rfl | hd
  · have : Subsingleton 𝓕 := isNIPWith_zero.1 isNIPWith_𝓕
    obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ : ∃ C, A =ᵐ[μ] Function.const Ω C := exists_ae_eq_const_of_subsingleton hA
    rw [condVar_congr_ae (hC.fun_comp (fun s ↦ s.indicator 1 x)), condVar_const]
    simp
  · calc
      _ ≤ μ Set.univ / 4 := condVar_indicator_le_meas_univ_div_four
      _ = μ Set.univ * (1 / 4) := mul_div_left_comm _ _ _
      _ ≤ μ Set.univ * d := by
        gcongr
        exact (div_le_self (by norm_num) (by norm_num)).trans (one_le_cast.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hd))
      _ = d * μ Set.univ := mul_comm _ _

apply condVar_le_of_bounds
  · intro; apply Set.indicator_apply_nonneg; intro; exact zero_le_one
  · intro; apply Set.indicator_apply_le; intro; exact le_rfl
condVar_le_of_bounded (ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ Set.indicator_mem_Icc_zero_one _ le_rfl le_rfl _) (by norm_num)
